case_title: IEP, FULL SERVICE PRINTING VS DELTA VENTURE PARTNERS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IEP, FULL SERVICE PRINTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELTA VENTURE PARTNERS $1,346.88 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,397.88 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26436, RECORD TRANSFERRED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT DELTA VENTURE PARTNERS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA VENTURE PARTNERS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,346.88 FILED BY IEP, FULL SERVICE PRINTING AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA VENTURE PARTNERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IEP, FULL SERVICE PRINTING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELTA VENTURE PARTNERS JUDGMENT IS ORDERED VACATED AND APPEAL IS DISMISSED. SCA 26436 ON 3-28-01. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
